title: Redd's Modded Barebones Addons
description: Various small to large resource packs adding "bare bonesified" versions of every texture for supported mods
body:
This is an addon retexturing mutliple mods to follow the looks of the [Bare Bones Resource Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb) (it makes minecraft look like the trailers(shaders not included, shaders used in screenshots is complimentary shaders with a ton of options changed so it looks closer to the trailers))


This page also includes the [leaves addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbba/version/leaves-v3.2) i made which adds color to leaves instead of having them one single solid color of green ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WoHBPzkI/images/685af6c802a45a0037b29165cde724191628e828.png?width=811&height=649) currently supported mods: [Ada Paxels mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adapaxels) | [1.18+ rp download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbba/version/Ada-1.0) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WoHBPzkI/images/ed18cc88d25f79a341dcc44ecbbc295d64f41625.png?width=811&height=649)

[Capybara mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/capybara-fabric) | [1.18+ rp download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbba/version/wd-1.0) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WoHBPzkI/images/c25882844d5498da23c3615a930b4d7aa33d29f1.png?width=811&height=649)

[Mo Glass mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-glass) | [1.19+ rp download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbba/version/moglass-v1) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WoHBPzkI/images/54ac712989b7be8ace8d63a202cc4d86235045e9.png?width=811&height=649) [Traverse mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse) | [1.19+ rp download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbba/version/traverse-v1) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WoHBPzkI/images/176b52f7afd06d0b88b68e2f50fff5596705a7da.png?width=811&height=649) [Promenade mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade) | [1.19-1.19.2 rp download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbba/version/promenade-v1) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WoHBPzkI/images/4b54bd79f915635a0e4d4a3f3693c1ca41cf6cd9.png?width=811&height=649) [Flonters mod (defunct)](https://modrinth.com/mod/flonters) | [1.18 only rp download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rmbba/version/flonters-v1) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WoHBPzkI/images/96488ad08501e72c8abc77d4bca9f7540669439e.png?width=811&height=649) [Current todo list](https://trello.com/b/51sXtH6Q/barebonesified-mods)
